notes.body: Congratulations on the 100% shop last week at Dixie. Keep them coming. (Standing: Halo Effect & Suggestive Sales signed forms due to Crystal Friday 5/8 by 5 PM. FGU 0% overdue by 5/15.)
New Weekly Synopsis.xlsx attached. Review for Monday 3 PM call. Standing: print 2065 Shopper Dashboard & K.P.I., post on comm board, be ready to discuss in-store this week.
Dixie Highway scored 100.0% on 5/01 shop. Brad called it out in writing this morning.
Incident #26-10106 (Jalapeno) returned to store — Five Guys Enterprises asking for DC case label image. 7-day auto-resolve clock from the 5/4 incident — respond before 5/11.
